---
title: "Analysis"
format: html
editor: visual
---

### ==============================================

### Analysis Script

### This script performs regression analysis and climate scenario simulations:

### 1. Estimate Stocking Rates

### 2.Estimate regression model 

### 3. Estimate projected stocking rates

# 4. Analysis of RCP4.5 and RCP8.5


### ===============================================

### 1. Estimate Stocking Rates

```{r}

AU <- 1000  # reference animal unit weight (lbs)
state_to_region <- function(state_name) {
  state_name <- tolower(state_name)
  dplyr::case_when(
    state_name %in% c("michigan", "wisconsin", "minnesota")                                                                                      ~ "Lake States",
    state_name %in% c("iowa", "illinois", "indiana", "ohio", "missouri")                                                                         ~ "Corn Belt",
    state_name %in% c("north dakota", "south dakota", "nebraska", "kansas")                                                                      ~ "Northern Plains",
    state_name %in% c("oklahoma", "texas")                                                                                                       ~ "Southern Plains",
    state_name %in% c("arkansas", "louisiana", "mississippi")                                                                                    ~ "Delta States",
    state_name %in% c("alabama", "south carolina", "georgia", "florida")                                                                         ~ "Southeast",
    state_name %in% c("west virginia", "kentucky", "virginia", "tennessee", "north carolina")                                                    ~ "Appalachia",
    state_name %in% c("maine", "new hampshire", "vermont", "massachusetts", "rhode island",
                       "connecticut", "new york", "new jersey", "pennsylvania", "delaware", "maryland") ~ "Northeast",
    state_name %in% c("montana", "idaho", "wyoming", "colorado", "utah", "nevada", "arizona", "new mexico")                                     ~ "Mountain",
    state_name %in% c("washington", "oregon", "california")                                                                                      ~ "Pacific",
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  )
}

# Merge pastureland and beef inventory, assign regions and grazing months
merged_ALL <- left_join(pasture_data_ALL, beef_inv, by = c("year", "state", "county")) %>%
  mutate(
    region = state_to_region(state),
    grazing_months = case_when(
      region == "Appalachia"      ~  8,  # mild winters, long forage season
      region == "Corn Belt"       ~  7,  # moderate climate, grazing typically Apr–Oct
      region == "Delta States"    ~  7,  # warm climate, long-season grasses
      region == "Lake States"     ~  6,  # shorter season due to northern latitude
      region == "Mountain"        ~  6,  # high elevation, snow cover → short grazing
      region == "Northeast"       ~  6,  # cool climate limits grazing to late spring–early fall
      region == "Northern Plains" ~  7,  # harsh winters
      region == "Pacific"         ~  8,  # long season in CA/OR/WA
      region == "Southeast"       ~  9,  # warm year-round climate
      region == "Southern Plains" ~  7,  # long warm season, mix of native & improved pastures
      TRUE                        ~ NA_real_
    )
  )

# Inventory-weighted national average grazing months by year
weighted_national_grazing <- merged_ALL %>%
  group_by(year, region) %>%
  summarize(
    total_inv      = sum(beef_inv, na.rm = TRUE),
    grazing_months = first(grazing_months),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarize(
    weighted_grazing_months = sum(total_inv * grazing_months, na.rm = TRUE) / sum(total_inv, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )


# Compute stocking rate (AUY/acre) at county level
# AUE adjusts for cow weight relative to the 1,000 lb reference animal
merged_ALL_SR <- left_join(merged_ALL, cattle_weight, by = "year") %>%
  na.omit() %>%
  mutate(
    AUE = case_when(
      mean_live_wt <= 900  ~ (mean_live_wt + 100) / AU,
      mean_live_wt >= 1100 ~ (mean_live_wt - 100) / AU,
      TRUE                 ~ 1
    ),
    AUs                  = AUE * beef_inv,
    stock_rate_AUY       = (AUs * grazing_months / 12) / pastureland_all_types,
    stock_rate_acrePerAU = 1 / stock_rate_AUY
  ) %>%
  dplyr::filter(
    year != 1978,
    pastureland_all_types > 0,   # drop zero pastureland (division by zero)
    is.finite(stock_rate_AUY),   # drop any remaining Inf
    stock_rate_AUY <= 10         # drop implausible outliers (data errors)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(year, state, county, stock_rate_AUY, stock_rate_acrePerAU, region)



merged_ALL_SR_regional <- left_join(merged_ALL, cattle_weight, by = "year") %>%
  na.omit()

regional_SR <- merged_ALL_SR_regional %>%
  mutate(
    AUE = case_when(
      mean_live_wt <= 900  ~ (mean_live_wt + 100) / 1000,
      mean_live_wt >= 1100 ~ (mean_live_wt - 100) / 1000,
      TRUE                 ~ 1
    ),
    AUs            = AUE * beef_inv,
    stock_rate_AUY = (AUs * (grazing_months / 12)) / pastureland_all_types
  ) %>%
  filter(
    pastureland_all_types > 0,
    is.finite(stock_rate_AUY),
    stock_rate_AUY <= 10
  ) %>%
  group_by(region, year) %>%
  summarise(
    total_AUs          = sum(AUs,                na.rm = TRUE),
    total_pastureland  = sum(pastureland_all_types, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_grazing_months = weighted.mean(grazing_months,
                                       w    = pastureland_all_types,
                                       na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    stock_rate_AUY_regional      = (total_AUs * (avg_grazing_months / 12)) / 
                                    total_pastureland,
    stock_rate_acrePerAU_regional = 1 / stock_rate_AUY_regional
  )

```


### 2.Estimate regression model 

```{r}

regression_data <- left_join(drought_final, hay_all_stocks_1000t, 
                              by = c("year", "state")) %>%
  left_join(merged_ALL_SR, by = c("year", "state", "county")) %>%
  filter(is.finite(stock_rate_AUY))

drought_lag_lookup <- drought_final %>%
  mutate(year_lead = year + 1) %>%   # this year's D becomes next year's lag
  select(state, county, year_lead, drought_lag1 = total_D)

hay_lag_lookup <- hay_all_stocks_1000t %>%
  mutate(year_lead = year + 1) %>%
  select(state, year_lead, hay_stock_1000t_lagged = hay_stock_1000t)

regression_data_lagged <- regression_data %>%
  # proper 1-year drought lag
  left_join(drought_lag_lookup,
            by = c("state", "county", "year" = "year_lead")) %>%
  # proper 1-year hay lag
  left_join(hay_lag_lookup,
            by = c("state", "year" = "year_lead")) %>%
  mutate(trend = year - min(year)) %>%
  na.omit()


reg_1lag <- feols(
  log(stock_rate_AUY) ~ total_D + drought_lag1 + 
                         total_GDD + total_EDD + 
                         hay_stock_1000t_lagged | county + year,
  data = regression_data_lagged)


# Compute neighbor average
state_hay_lookup <- hay_lag_lookup %>%
  rename(year = year_lead)  # back to actual year for joining

neighbor_hay <- state_hay_lookup %>%
  left_join(neighbors_long, by = "state") %>%
  left_join(
    state_hay_lookup %>%
      rename(neighbor_state = state,
             neighbor_hay   = hay_stock_1000t_lagged),
    by = c("year", "neighbor_state")
  ) %>%
  group_by(year, state) %>%
  summarise(
    neighbor_avg_hay_stock_1000t_lagged = mean(neighbor_hay, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_neighbors_used                    = sum(!is.na(neighbor_hay)),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# === Robustness model — neighbor hay ===
regression_data_lagged_neighbour <- regression_data_lagged %>%
  left_join(neighbor_hay, by = c("year", "state"))

reg_1_neighbour <- feols(
    log(stock_rate_AUY) ~ total_D + drought_lag1 +
                           total_GDD + total_EDD +
                           neighbor_avg_hay_stock_1000t_lagged | county + year, data = regression_data_lagged_neighbour
  )

```

### 3. Estimate projected stocking rates

```{r}

# ## Projected Hay Stocks
# hay_proj_for_SR <- readRDS("/Users/sharaakat/Dropbox/akat_shara/DWFI_drought/GitHub/RobustnessCheck/Data/Hay_Projected.rds")
# 
# hay_proj_45_clean <- hay_proj_for_SR %>%
#   dplyr::filter(scenario == "RCP4.5") 
# hay_proj_45_clean$year <- hay_proj_45_clean$year_lead
# 
# hay_proj_85_clean <- hay_proj_for_SR %>%
#   dplyr::filter(scenario == "RCP8.5") 
# hay_proj_85_clean$year <- hay_proj_85_clean$year_lead
# 
# 
# # ── County FEs from reg_1lag ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
# county_fe_dt <- data.table(
#   county    = names(fixef(reg_1lag)$county),
#   county_fe = as.numeric(fixef(reg_1lag)$county)
# )
# sr_b <- coef(reg_1lag)
# 
# # ── Region grazing season lookup ──────────────────────────────────────────────
# region_grazing_months <- data.frame(
#   region      = c("Appalachia","Corn Belt","Delta States","Lake States",
#                   "Mountain","Northeast","Northern Plains",
#                   "Pacific","Southeast","Southern Plains"),
#   start_month = c(3, 4, 4, 4, 4, 4, 4, 3, 3, 4),
#   end_month   = c(10, 10, 10, 9, 9, 9, 10, 10, 11, 10)
# )
# 
# # ── Main projection function ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
# project_stocking_rate <- function(realization, output_dir) {
# 
#   file_45 <- readRDS(file.path(output_dir, sprintf("Weather_r%02d_4.5.rds", realization)))
#   file_85 <- readRDS(file.path(output_dir, sprintf("Weather_r%02d_8.5.rds", realization)))
# 
#   # --- Filter to grazing season per region -----------------------------------
#   filter_grazing_season <- function(data) {
#     data %>%
#       mutate(region = state_to_region(STATE_NAME)) %>%
#       filter(!is.na(region)) %>%
#       left_join(region_grazing_months, by = "region") %>%
#       filter(month >= start_month & month <= end_month) %>%  # BUG FIX: was <- instead of <=
#       group_by(year, STATE_NAME, NAME) %>%
#       summarise(
#         total_D   = sum(monthly_D,   na.rm = TRUE),
#         total_GDD = sum(monthly_GDD, na.rm = TRUE),
#         total_EDD = sum(monthly_EDD, na.rm = TRUE),
#         .groups = "drop"
#       ) %>%
#       rename(state = STATE_NAME, county = NAME) %>%
#       mutate(state  = tolower(state),
#              county = tolower(county))
#   }
# 
#   annual_45 <- filter_grazing_season(file_45)
#   annual_85 <- filter_grazing_season(file_85)
# 
#   # --- Merge projected hay stocks --------------------------------------------
#   joined_45 <- annual_45 %>%
#     left_join(hay_proj_45_clean %>%
#                 dplyr::select(year, state, hay_stock_1000t_lagged),
#               by = c("year", "state"))
# 
#   joined_85 <- annual_85 %>%
#     left_join(hay_proj_85_clean %>%
#                 dplyr::select(year, state, hay_stock_1000t_lagged),
#               by = c("year", "state"))
# 
#   # --- Add lagged D within county --------------------------------------------
#   add_lags <- function(data) {
#     data %>%
#       arrange(state, county, year) %>%
#       group_by(state, county) %>%
#       mutate(drought_lag1 = dplyr::lag(total_D, 1)) %>%
#       ungroup() %>%
#       filter(!is.na(drought_lag1), !is.na(hay_stock_1000t_lagged))
#   }
# 
#   lagged_45 <- add_lags(joined_45)
#   lagged_85 <- add_lags(joined_85)
# 
#   # --- Predict SR: manual coefficients + county FE (drop year FE) -----------
#   # Using predict() with fixest on future years fails — year FEs don't exist.
#   # Correct approach: beta*X + county_FE only (S&R style out-of-sample)
#   predict_SR <- function(data, scenario) {
#     as.data.table(data) %>%
#       merge(county_fe_dt, by = "county", all.x = TRUE) %>%
#       .[, log_SR_hat :=
#           sr_b["total_D"]                * total_D              +
#           sr_b["drought_lag1"]           * drought_lag1         +
#           sr_b["total_GDD"]              * total_GDD            +
#           sr_b["total_EDD"]              * total_EDD            +
#           sr_b["hay_stock_1000t_lagged"] * hay_stock_1000t_lagged +
#           county_fe] %>%
#       .[, SR_hat   := exp(log_SR_hat)] %>%
#       .[, scenario := scenario]
#   }
# 
#   SR_45 <- predict_SR(lagged_45, "RCP 4.5")
#   SR_85 <- predict_SR(lagged_85, "RCP 8.5")
# 
#   # --- Save ------------------------------------------------------------------
#   combined <- bind_rows(SR_45, SR_85) %>%
#     mutate(realization = sprintf("r%02d", realization))
# 
#   saveRDS(combined,
#           file.path(output_dir, sprintf("SRate_r%02d.rds", realization)))
# 
#   cat(sprintf("Saved realization r%02d\n", realization))
# }
# 
# # ── Run ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# output_dir <- "/Volumes/Extreme SSD/UNL/DWFI/Drought/data/Climate_Projection_2"
# for (realization in 1:10) {
#   project_stocking_rate(realization, output_dir)
# }

# Join all realizatino data into 1 and get average Stocking Rates
strate_01 <- readRDS("/Volumes/Extreme SSD/UNL/DWFI/Drought/data/Climate_Projection_2/SRate_r01.rds")
strate_02 <- readRDS("/Volumes/Extreme SSD/UNL/DWFI/Drought/data/Climate_Projection_2/SRate_r02.rds")
strate_03 <- readRDS("/Volumes/Extreme SSD/UNL/DWFI/Drought/data/Climate_Projection_2/SRate_r03.rds")
strate_04 <- readRDS("/Volumes/Extreme SSD/UNL/DWFI/Drought/data/Climate_Projection_2/SRate_r04.rds")
strate_05 <- readRDS("/Volumes/Extreme SSD/UNL/DWFI/Drought/data/Climate_Projection_2/SRate_r05.rds")
strate_06 <- readRDS("/Volumes/Extreme SSD/UNL/DWFI/Drought/data/Climate_Projection_2/SRate_r06.rds")
strate_07 <- readRDS("/Volumes/Extreme SSD/UNL/DWFI/Drought/data/Climate_Projection_2/SRate_r07.rds")
strate_08 <- readRDS("/Volumes/Extreme SSD/UNL/DWFI/Drought/data/Climate_Projection_2/SRate_r08.rds")
strate_09 <- readRDS("/Volumes/Extreme SSD/UNL/DWFI/Drought/data/Climate_Projection_2/SRate_r09.rds")
strate_10 <- readRDS("/Volumes/Extreme SSD/UNL/DWFI/Drought/data/Climate_Projection_2/SRate_r10.rds")

combined_data <- bind_rows(strate_01, strate_02, strate_03, strate_04, strate_05,
                           strate_06, strate_07, strate_08, strate_09, strate_10)


average_stock_rate_US <- combined_data %>%
  group_by(year, scenario) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_projected_stock_rate = mean(SR_hat, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_projected_stock_rate = sd(SR_hat, na.rm = TRUE),
    n = sum(!is.na(SR_hat)),
    se_projected_stock_rate = sd_projected_stock_rate / sqrt(n),
    ci_lower = mean_projected_stock_rate - 1.96 * se_projected_stock_rate,
    ci_upper = mean_projected_stock_rate + 1.96 * se_projected_stock_rate,
    .groups = "drop"
  )

```


### 4. Analysis of RCP4.5 and RCP8.5

```{r}

output_dir <- "/Volumes/Extreme SSD/UNL/DWFI/Drought/data/Climate_Projection_2"
all_r_full <- map_dfr(1:10, function(r) {
  r45 <- readRDS(file.path(output_dir, sprintf("Weather_r%02d_4.5.rds", r)))
  r85 <- readRDS(file.path(output_dir, sprintf("Weather_r%02d_8.5.rds", r)))
  bind_rows(
    r45 %>% mutate(scenario = "RCP4.5", realization = r),
    r85 %>% mutate(scenario = "RCP8.5", realization = r)
  )
}) %>%
  filter(year >= 2022) %>%
  group_by(year, scenario) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_tmax = mean(monthly_tmax, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_GDD  = mean(monthly_GDD,  na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_EDD  = mean(monthly_EDD,  na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_D    = mean(monthly_D,    na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_ppt  = mean(monthly_ppt,  na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups   = "drop"
  )

```
